## Source: ghsa-malware (13ba2515977ae0849e3269ab5ea6d371cf136982544c5d630cd9749ec0992ca5)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c9b92c44ca626e6347b7268f60a919598a96b7b49491c0e2eed6b9d7f0d3ab73)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'komojuu' @ 99.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
